mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate lowers the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, mechanically compressing equity valuation multiples and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid decline in the unemployment rate signals accelerating economic recovery and rising household income, which boosts corporate revenue expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or Rank IC drops below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real GDP and new housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand expansion, supporting corporate earnings growth and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint GDPC1 and HOUST increases coincide with negative SPX 60d returns in > 50% of observations over any 3-year walk-forward period.

mechanism_narrative: In a supply-constrained macro regime, rising industrial production fails to translate to margin expansion due to bottleneck inflation and input cost pressures, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d forward returns are positive when INDPRO rises > 1.5% month-over-month in the specified regime, or the signal exhibits no predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01).

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price inflation exceeding 3.0% annualized triggers market expectations of aggressive Federal Reserve tightening, which compresses equity risk premiums and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns remain positive when CPIAUCSL YoY exceeds 3% for two consecutive quarters, or the signal fails to predict drawdowns in high-inflation environments.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales reflect strong consumer spending momentum, directly supporting near-term equity cash flows and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for RSAFS changes versus SPX 5d returns is statistically indistinguishable from zero (p > 0.10) over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous rise in total nonfarm payrolls and decline in the unemployment rate confirms labor market tightening, reducing recession risk and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint PAYEMS increase and UNRATE decline coincides with negative SPX 20d returns in > 55% of observations over a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: During a housing-led expansion phase, sustained high housing starts predict positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as construction activity multiplies into broader economic growth and corporate earnings.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative when HOUST remains above 1400 for three consecutive months, or the signal produces a negative Rank IC over any 2-year rolling window.
